questions_for_user: WHERE to create — this is the blocking question (Rule #0). The provided URL `ieTGS0ab6tqr3zwXRYPHIu` IS the canonical CM source file (per .claude/figma/case-management-pattern.md). Three valid destinations: (1) on a new '🛠 Drafts' page inside that same file (safe sandbox, can reference canonical side-by-side), (2) new file in Sumsub org with planKey from design-system.md (recommended for work tasks per skill default), (3) the existing 'Case page' page next to canonical frame `4045:2323380` (NOT recommended — risks polluting canon). Which?

Should I copy the canonical Overview tab content INSTANCE (key `937dcc919d4d8006fd792aceda340bd7da1a0cd0`) AS-IS, or also override its internal blocks (case status / priority / assignee / SLA / progress bar / applicant info)? Pattern B audit only checks structure — the internal block content is whatever the component ships with. Real reviews want realistic case data.

Right column content overrides — should checklist show progress mid-flow (e.g. 3 of 7 completed), and how many notes (1 short note, or 2-3 with mixed authors and timestamps)? .Case page checklist and .Case page notes accept content overrides but only via probed property keys.

Case header content — title (case name like 'Case #C-2026-04832'), case status variant (In review / Approved / Rejected / Awaiting / Resolved), priority (Low/Medium/High/Critical), assignee (real Sumsub team member from CLAUDE.md UX team list, or generic), creation source (Workflow builder / Manual / Transaction rule), due date (e.g. 'Due in 18h' for SLA visualization). All these are component variants on Case page header — need to pick which 'state' to demonstrate.
Active tab — confirm Overview is selected (the canonical), and the other 5 tabs (AML / Related cases / Financial data / FIU reports / Events) stay unselected with no counters/badges?
